nasb.text: But Jesus said to him, “No one, after putting his hand to the plow and looking back, is fit for the kingdom of God.”

esv.text: Jesus said to him, “No one who puts his hand to the plow and looks back is fit for the kingdom of God.”

cnv.text: 耶穌說：“手扶著犁向後看的，不適合進　神的國。”

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“手扶着犁向后看的人不配进上帝的国。”

csbs.text: 耶稣对他说：“手扶着犁又看背后之事的人，不配神的国。”
